Operation 'unlinkClientFromLocation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Operation has no description and vague summary. Added clarity about what 'unlink' means in this domain context (removes association), what entities are affected, authentication requirement, return value, and clarification that this is a soft delete of the relationship only. This helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and effects.

data.current_summary: Unlink a client from a location
data.description_suggestion: Removes the association between a client and a location (box). This operation deletes the link in the client-location mapping, effectively removing the client from that location's roster. Requires authentication. Returns a success response confirming the unlinking operation. The client record and location record remain intact; only their association is removed.
data.reasoning: Operation has no description and vague summary. Added clarity about what 'unlink' means in this domain context (removes association), what entities are affected, authentication requirement, return value, and clarification that this is a soft delete of the relationship only. This helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and effects.

message: Operation 'createBoxWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Operation lacks description entirely. Added context about webhook purpose (event notifications), what input is expected (WebhookRequest with URL and event types), authentication requirement, return value, and side effect (webhook becomes active). Uses consistent terminology 'location (box)' to align with API domain context.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new webhook for a location (box) to receive event notifications. Accepts a WebhookRequest containing the webhook URL and event types to subscribe to. Requires authentication. Returns the created webhook object with a unique identifier and configuration details. The webhook will begin receiving notifications for the specified events immediately upon creation.
data.reasoning: Operation lacks description entirely. Added context about webhook purpose (event notifications), what input is expected (WebhookRequest with URL and event types), authentication requirement, return value, and side effect (webhook becomes active). Uses consistent terminology 'location (box)' to align with API domain context.

message: Operation 'listBoxWebhooks' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Operation has no description. Added clarity about what is returned (list of webhook objects with details), authentication requirement, and clarification that it's read-only. Uses consistent terminology 'locations (boxes)' and references the actual response schema type for better AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all webhooks configured for locations (boxes). Requires authentication. Returns a WebhooksListResponse containing an array of webhook objects with their configurations, URLs, event subscriptions, and status information. This operation is read-only and does not modify any webhook state.
data.reasoning: Operation has no description. Added clarity about what is returned (list of webhook objects with details), authentication requirement, and clarification that it's read-only. Uses consistent terminology 'locations (boxes)' and references the actual response schema type for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'deleteBoxWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Operation lacks description and has vague summary. Added details about required path parameter (webhook ID), authentication requirement, return value, and important side effect (webhook stops receiving notifications and deletion is permanent). This helps AI agents understand what input is required and the consequences of the operation.

data.description_suggestion: Deletes a webhook from a location (box) by its identifier. Requires the webhook ID as a path parameter. Requires authentication. Returns a success response confirming the deletion. Once deleted, the webhook will no longer receive event notifications and cannot be recovered without recreating it.
data.reasoning: Operation lacks description and has vague summary. Added details about required path parameter (webhook ID), authentication requirement, return value, and important side effect (webhook stops receiving notifications and deletion is permanent). This helps AI agents understand what input is required and the consequences of the operation.

message: Operation 'createToken' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and actionable, but description is completely missing. Added details about authentication mechanism, expected inputs (credentials), token usage in headers, and response contents to help AI agents understand the authentication flow and token lifecycle.

data.description_suggestion: Authenticates using provided credentials (username, password, and client ID) and returns a bearer token for use in subsequent API requests. The returned token should be included in the Authorization header as 'Bearer {token}' for all authenticated endpoints. Token expiration and refresh details are included in the response.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable, but description is completely missing. Added details about authentication mechanism, expected inputs (credentials), token usage in headers, and response contents to help AI agents understand the authentication flow and token lifecycle.

message: Operation 'getCurrentEntity' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is adequate but description is missing. Added context about what 'entity' means in this API, authentication requirement, what information is returned, and practical use cases for AI agents to understand when to call this endpoint.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves information about the currently authenticated entity (user or service account). Requires valid bearer token authentication.
